channel.title: +Select Bibliography on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Select Bibliography on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Primary Sources
item.description: Anonymous Prolegomena to Platonic Philosophy. Introduction, text, and translation by L.G. Westerink. Amsterdam: North-Holland, 1962. Aristotle. Aristotle. Vol. 6, On The Heavens. Translation by W.K.C. Guthrie. Loeb Classical Library. Cambridge: Harvard University Press, 1939; 1971. ———. Aristotle’s Metaphysics. 2 vols. Text, introduction, and commentary by W.D. Ross. Oxford: Clarendon Press, 1958. The Chaldean Oracles. Text, translation, and commentary by Ruth Majercik. Leiden: E.J. Brill, 1989. Corpus Hermeticum. 4 vols. Trans. A.

item.title: Secondary Sources
item.description: Alleau, René, ed. La Magie arabe traditionnelle. Introduction and notes by Sylvain Matton. Paris: Retz, 1977. Armstrong, A.H. “The Apprehension of Divinity in the Self and Cosmos in Plotinus.” In The Significance of Neoplatonism, edited by R.B. Harris, 187–97. Norfolk, Va.: International Society for Neoplatonic Studies, 1976. ———. Classical Mediterranean Spirituality. New York: Crossroad, 1986. ———. “The Escape of the One: An Investigation of Some Possibilities of Apophatic Theology Imperfectly Realized in the West.
